title: girls trip to london | food spots, thrifting & exploring the city
description:
Hi guys and happy Wednesday! My friend Matthea recently moved to London and I was way too excited to visit her so I decided to buy the next plane ticket to London. We had the most amazing time together, even though it was just for two days. We ate some really delicious food, explored SoHo and Nothing Hill and checked out one of London’s most famous flea market, Portobello Market. I hope you will enjoy this London vlog!! See you next Wednesday. Lots of love xx

👚 my outfits: https://shopmy.us/col
